title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Kale Consultants - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Kale Consultants - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Kale Consultants family as a Backend Developer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Kale Consultants:
Kale Consultants is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants!
